steps.title: Substitute to eliminate the repeated expression
steps.content: Notice that $(5 - 2x)$ appears in both terms on both sides of the equation. Let $u = (5 - 2x)$. The equation becomes: $$8u + 3 = 7u + 18$$

steps.title: Solve for u
steps.content: Subtract $7u$ from both sides: $$u + 3 = 18$$ Subtract 3 from both sides: $$u = 15$$ Since $u = (5 - 2x)$, we have $(5 - 2x) = 15$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
